description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser threnodic metamagic rod 9,000 gp Threnodic metamagic rod 32,500 gp Greater threnodic metamagic rod 73,000 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are affected as though by the Threnodic Spell feat.
